lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

The vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant rust and several large dents. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears and stains. The engine and transmission require major repairs to be functional.

The vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and several small dents. The interior shows significant wear and staining. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the car will require some maintenance and minor repairs soon.

Roll up your sleeves for this fantastic project opportunity! This car is a budget-friendly dream for a DIY enthusiast or mechanic looking to restore a vehicle with great bones. It currently needs significant mechanical repairs and cosmetic TLC, but it’s a wonderful chance to bring a classic back to life at a very accessible price point!

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, appearing as though it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep, mirror-like finish and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and all electronic features and accessories function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, having been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and stored in a climate-controlled environment. This is a collector-quality example that requires nothing but a new owner who appreciates a truly preserved vehicle.

This vehicle is in fair condition and has been used daily, though it now requires some cosmetic and mechanical attention. The exterior shows its age with noticeable paint fading on the hood and roof, as well as several small dents and scratches around the body. Inside, the interior is intact but shows significant wear, including some tearing on the driver's seat and stains on the rear carpet. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives, but the buyer should expect to address a slow oil leak and aging tires in the near future. It remains a dependable option for those looking for a functional vehicle at a lower price point.

We are proud to present this superlative example, preserved in an impeccable state that rivals its original showroom debut. Every aspect of this vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin. This specimen is a testament to uncompromising care and represents a rare opportunity for the sophisticated buyer to acquire a vehicle of investment-grade quality. Experience the pinnacle of performance and aesthetics in a package that remains indistinguishable from new.

Hey there! I'm so excited to show you this absolute gem! Honestly, it's in such incredible, flawless condition—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied this car since day one, and it's truly a dream to drive. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere! Come take a look, I promise you’re going to fall in love at first sight!

Offered is a mechanically flawless E46 M3, a benchmark in naturally aspirated engineering. The S54 B32 inline-six maintains factory-spec compression across all cylinders, benefiting from a comprehensive Double VANOS overhaul and proactive rear subframe reinforcement. Every shift through the close-ratio 6-speed manual gearbox is precise, delivering linear torque to the rear wheels via a perfectly calibrated variable M-differential lock. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, featuring refreshed bushings and dampers that ensure zero-deflection turn-in response. This is a high-revving, turn-key masterpiece preserved for the purist who demands peak mechanical performance and internal combustion
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Full service history included. Firm price.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the word 'pristine.' This car has been garage-kept since day one and meticulously detailed weekly, resulting in a finish that glows with a deep, mirror-like luster. The exterior is entirely free of rock chips, swirls, or imperfections, preserving its showroom-fresh appearance. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats are supple with zero bolster wear, and the original factory scent still lingers. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the adaptive driver aids, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is immaculate, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by certified specialists. With exceptionally low mileage and a comprehensive service history included, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a modern classic in its absolute peak state. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and incredibly smooth.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, preserved in a state that defies its tenure. Every surface, from the hand-finished interior to the flawless exterior luster, adheres to the most stringent standards of excellence. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this offering is tailored for the discerning collector who demands nothing short of perfection. Experience a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle maintained to the highest possible aesthetic and mechanical standards.

We are pleased to present this motorcar in truly impeccable condition. Maintained to the highest professional standards, this vehicle presents in showroom state both mechanically and aesthetically. It represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection. Every detail reflects a legacy of uncompromising care and meticulous preservation.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolutely mint condition—I’ve babied it since day one and it still looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! You won’t find a single scratch or hiccup here. It’s been kept in a climate-controlled garage and serviced religiously. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new without the dealership headache, this is definitely the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions or if you want to come take a look!

Pristine condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Clean title. Maintenance records included.

This vehicle is a pristine, showroom-quality example that has been fastidiously maintained and kept in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings, complemented by factory wheels that are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, featuring supple leather upholstery with no bolster wear, original high-pile carpeting protected by floor mats, and a complete suite of fully functional electronics. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, having followed a rigorous preventative maintenance schedule with all records documented at authorized service centers. With a clean title, a spotless history report, and a chassis that remains as tight and responsive as the day it was manufactured, this is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a virtually untouched masterpiece.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, preserved in peerless condition. This vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting no discernible wear and functioning with factory-level precision. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly pristine asset that transcends the typical secondary market offering. Available now for immediate acquisition.

We are pleased to present this automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an aesthetic and mechanical integrity that satisfies the most discerning standards. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, its presentation is beyond reproach. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade acquisition, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home. This car is in absolute pristine condition—it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot! No scratches, no dents, and the interior is totally spotless. It’s been babied since day one and is ready for its next adventure. You won't find another one this clean, I promise! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This specimen represents a pinnacle of mechanical preservation, featuring a high-revving, naturally aspirated power plant with factory-spec compression and impeccably maintained valvetrain tolerances. The drivetrain utilizes a precision-engineered limited-slip differential and a close-ratio manual gearbox, ensuring optimal torque distribution and tactile engagement. The chassis remains exceptionally rigid, with all suspension kinematics—including bushings, dampers, and control arms—operating in their original design window for razor-sharp turn-in and neutral handling. The braking system retains its thermal efficiency with cross-drilled rotors and multi-piston calipers providing consistent, fade-free deceleration. This is a turn-key enthusiast vehicle with zero structural fatigue and perfect fluid analysis results, suited for the most discerning collector.
2021 Luxury Sedan. Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Complete service history. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a true collector-grade specimen that defies its age, this vehicle has been maintained with an obsessive level of care. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish, free of swirl marks, stone chips, or imperfections, and has been treated with a multi-layer ceramic coating for lasting protection. Inside, the cabin retains its original showroom scent; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolster wear, and every electronic component functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance and a drive that is as tight and responsive as the day it was first delivered. From the immaculate engine bay to the pristine undercarriage, this is a turn-key time capsule for the enthusiast who demands absolute perfection.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a standard of care that preserves its original aesthetic and mechanical integrity. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects meticulous stewardship. Rigorously inspected to ensure peak mechanical integrity, this motorcar offers a driving experience indistinguishable from new. For the most discerning enthusiast, this represents a rare opportunity to secure a vehicle of truly distinguished caliber.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s honestly in flawless, showroom-ready shape—inside and out. It still has that fresh new-car feel and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’m looking for someone who will love it as much as I have. Come take it for a spin, I promise you won't be disappointed!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS timing. This specimen boasts a documented subframe reinforcement and a comprehensive valvetrain service. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, feeding power through a variable M-differential lock. The chassis integrity is superlative, maintaining factory-spec suspension geometry and bushings. Finished in Carbon Black with flawless paint depth and a pristine undercarriage, this vehicle represents a turnkey investment for the discerning collector seeking peak mechanical and aesthetic preservation.
2022 luxury sedan. Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in showroom condition, having been meticulously preserved by a single dedicated owner. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-finish paint job entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or blemishes, reflecting its life spent in a climate-controlled environment. Step inside to find an interior that remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the high-grade leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, the dashboard is pristine, and the original factory scent lingers. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, operates with precision. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a comprehensive service history detailing every preventative maintenance interval performed at the dealership. It offers a tight, responsive driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This listing includes all original manuals, two sets of keys, and the original window sticker. For the discerning buyer seeking perfection, this is the definitive choice.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.
